$comment: Default settings seed for Aperture — R2 values (Docs 19-21). At runtime these live INSIDE the encrypted DB (doc 13 §6); this file is the first-run seed. [VERIFY] all model names / hotkeys / thresholds against the real target and current vendor docs (doc 00 conventions).

capture.$comment_default_state: Capture is OFF until the user opts in at first run (doc 13 §8).
capture.$comment_heartbeat: Adaptive heartbeat band (ADR-032/Q41): default 10 s, pulled toward the floor when event density is high and the ceiling when quiet.

loadout.$comment: L1 = Qwen2.5-VL-3B + faster-whisper small, co-residency CONDITIONAL on the 7.0 GB projection (ADR-030 — STT is the swap victim when it doesn't fit). L2 = Qwen2.5-VL-7B exclusive (opt-in, doc 04 §3).
loadout.$comment_stt: GPU path = faster-whisper (CTranslate2) small ~2 GB; CPU fallback = whisper.cpp base/tiny (ADR-024).

pattern_engine.$comment_cap: Adaptive global cap 2-8/hr (ADR-032); the default is only the cold-start value.
pattern_engine.$comment_session_gap: Rolling idle-gap sessionizer (ADR-032): 15 min is the cold-start default; the learned gap clamps to 5-45 min.
pattern_engine.$comment_half_life: Split decay half-lives (ADR-033): temporal patterns ~5 d, sequence patterns ~14 d.

ui.$comment_glass: ADR-039: at most 2 glass surfaces; the 3rd visible bubble renders in the opaque fallback class. Blur ceiling 12 px (doc 14 §2).

reasoning.$comment_transport: MCP-primary (ADR-025): Desktop MCP -> Claude CLI -> Messages API.
reasoning.$comment_scoped_allow: ADR-026 scoped always-allow: per-call approval remains the base; a scope grant still displays the payload with a cancel window, and every send is audited.
reasoning.$comment_model: Claude model id + any beta headers are settings, never code (locked NG8). [VERIFY at build time].

privacy.$comment_exclusions: Defaults ship EMPTY (ADR-029/Q15): onboarding detects password managers/banking and SUGGESTS exclusions — the user confirms; nothing is ever auto-excluded.
